nasb.text: behold, the Lord is going to strike your people, your sons, your wives and all your possessions with a great calamity;

esv.text: behold, the Lord will bring a great plague on your people, your children, your wives, and all your possessions,

cnv.text: 所以耶和華要用極大的災禍擊打你的人民、妻子和兒女，以及你的一切財產。

ccb.text: 因此，耶和华要降大灾祸给你的人民、儿女、妻妾及一切所有。
